findings.claim: ADR 0032 (Accepted) requires connect-mode font builds to ship without a GPOS kerning table (features.kerning set to false), while ADR 0039 (Accepted) requires connect-mode font builds to ship a GPOS PairPos kern table via kerning:true. Neither document's Status field marks it Superseded, Rejected, or Deprecated, so both are live decisions a single codebase cannot simultaneously satisfy: the connect build path's kerning flag cannot be both false and true.

citations.quote: Connected fonts always build non-italic, ship without a GPOS kerning table, and bypass optical sidebearing optimization
Connect mode ships a GPOS PairPos kern table via `kerning:true` and `connectKern:{}`.

findings.consequence: A maintainer or new contributor reading ADR 0032 alone would believe connect-mode builds must never emit a GPOS kern table, and could 'fix' the codebase by reverting kerning:true to false, silently breaking the connect-kern feature ADR 0039 (and the later ADR 0040-0052 chain built on it) depends on. The fix is to update ADR 0032's Status to Superseded (or add an explicit superseded-by note) rather than leave both as independently Accepted.

findings.claim: ADR 0033 (Accepted) categorically forbids synthesizing connector strokes between letters, requiring the engine to abut only real traced ink, while ADR 0049 (Accepted) permits connector reconstruction/synthesis from measured parameters of the hand. Both carry Status: Accepted with no Superseded/Deprecated marking on ADR 0033, so the log records two live, mutually exclusive rules about whether the codebase may synthesize connector geometry.

citations.quote: never synthesizing vector connector bars between letters.
Connector reconstruction from measured parameters of the same hand is permitted.

findings.consequence: A reader relying on ADR 0033's still-Accepted status would treat any connector-synthesis code (the stroke reconstruction shipped per ADR 0049-0052) as a violation of standing doctrine and could attempt to revert it, undoing the connector-reconstruction milestone. ADR 0033's Status should be updated to reflect that it was amended by ADR 0049 so the two documents do not both read as unconditional, current policy.
